title: festuca rubra f. nigrescens
intro: Festuca rubra f. nigrescens, also known as black bent, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Festuca rubra f. nigrescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve.
